channel.title: Q&A Podcast
channel.itunes:author: RabbiOrlofsky.com
channel.copyright: Copyright Rabbi Dovid Orlofsky. All Rights Reserved.
channel.description: Join R' Orlofsky as he tackles listener questions with his trademark mix of wit, warmth, and Torah wisdom. From serious life issues to lighthearted curiosities, every episode offers timeless lessons and plenty of laughs.

item.title: Can You Handle Being a Kollel Wife?
item.dc:creator: Ari Bennett
item.description: Join R' Orlofsky as he tackles listener questions with his trademark mix of wit, warmth, and Torah wisdom. From serious life issues to lighthearted curiosities, every episode offers timeless lessons and plenty of laughs.

item.dc:creator: Ari Bennett
item.description: Join R' Orlofsky as he tackles listener questions with his trademark mix of wit, warmth, and Torah wisdom. From serious life issues to lighthearted curiosities, every episode offers timeless lessons and plenty of laughs.
item.content:encoded: Join R' Orlofsky as he tackles listener questions with his trademark mix of wit, warmth, and Torah wisdom. From serious life issues to lighthearted curiosities, every episode offers timeless lessons and plenty of laughs.
item.itunes:author: Rabbi Dovid Orlofsky
item.itunes:summary: Join R' Orlofsky as he tackles listener questions with his trademark mix of wit, warmth, and Torah wisdom. From serious life issues to lighthearted curiosities, every episode offers timeless lessons and plenty of laughs.
item.itunes:title: Fixing Unesaneh Tokef

media:content.media:title: Fixing Unesaneh Tokef

item.title: Sukkos in the Fall… But We Run Inside When It Rains?
item.dc:creator: Ari Bennett
item.description: Join R' Orlofsky as he tackles listener questions with his trademark mix of wit, warmth, and Torah wisdom. From serious life issues to lighthearted curiosities, every episode offers timeless lessons and plenty of laughs.
